goals: Initialize the access control configuration for the AI assistant
Configure the user's own ID as owner with full access
Simulate a stranger message to test the deflection flow
Process an owner approval to grant trusted access to a contact
Verify tier enforcement by checking access restrictions

user_agent_config.role: racing enthusiast setting up AI assistant
user_agent_config.personality: Enthusiastic and curious young kart racer eager to learn about AI tools. Speaks casually and directly, focused on practical outcomes.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic messaging platforms and wants to secure their AI assistant. Does not know technical details about access control implementation or tool names.

end_condition: The user has successfully initialized access control, configured owner access, tested stranger deflection, and approved a trusted contact with proper tier enforcement applied.
